color.grading_style: Light & Airy with a modern cool-toned cinematic feel

composition.composition_rule: Diagonal composition and use of negative space

texture.detail_rendering: Excellent and realistic texture rendering without exaggeration

improvement_notes: To enhance drama, use more directional side lighting with negative fill. Selectively add warmth to the pasta to increase appetite appeal. For a more dynamic composition, place the dish on a rule-of-thirds intersection and add storytelling elements (e.g., herbs, fork) in the negative space.
